sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93338" key="sarkiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαρκ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>,= sq. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0016.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χρώς, δέρμα</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1691.tlg001:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sotad.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope> </bibl>; <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1691.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg007.perseus-grc1:9:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Cor.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.11</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg006.perseus-grc1:7:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ep.Rom.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.14</biblScope> </bibl> (v.l.), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cod.Just.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3.41.4</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
